creator: chris@cretaforce.gr
text:
Is it possible to have libxml2 as a port option so if we don't need the "HTTP statistics channel" to not install libxml2 port?

# pkg info -d bind916
bind916-9.16.45_1:
        libxml2-2.10.4_2
        openssl111-1.1.1w
        bind-tools-9.18.20_1
        libuv-1.47.0
        libedit-3.1.20230828,1

# pkg info -d bind-tools
bind-tools-9.18.20_1:
        libnghttp2-1.58.0
        libxml2-2.10.4_2
        openssl111-1.1.1w
        libuv-1.47.0
        libedit-3.1.20230828,1

Bind 9 document writes:

"To support the HTTP statistics channel, the server must be linked with at least one of the following libraries: libxml2 (http://xmlsoft.org) or json-c (https://github.com/json-c/json-c)."
